data.content:
Implementation review APPROVED. Both requirements fully satisfied:

1) Agent outcome stats: JSONL-based concurrent-safe tracking in .foolery-logs/agent-success-rates.jsonl. AgentOutcomeRecord captures agent identity, claimed/post-exit state, exit code, rollback status, and success classification. Success = exit 0 AND beat moved to next or prior queue state. 7 unit tests for stats module.

2) Error-exit retry with agent exclusion: handleTakeIterationClose rolls back action states via enforceQueueTerminalInvariant, then retries with a different agent from the pool (strict exclusion via selectFromPoolStrict). Terminates if no alternative agent is available. 8 integration tests covering retry, no-alternative stop, success classification, and rollback-before-retry.

Quality gates: 2134 tests passing, typecheck clean, lint clean, build successful. No security issues or regressions.
